.help
help
.help
help
npx hardhat compile
await staking.stake({ value: ethers.parseEther("1") })
const staking = await Staking.attach("0x5FbDB2315678afecb367f032d93F642f64180aa3");
const Staking = await ethers.getContractFactory("Staking");
.exit
const Staking = await ethers.getContractFactory("Staking");
